sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Adams sorted our boiler out within hours of calling. Friendly, professional and very fairly priced. Would highly recommend to anyone in Birmingham.

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Had a leak under the kitchen sink that was getting worse. They came out same day and fixed it quickly. Great service and no mess left behind.

sample_reviews.author: Priya K
sample_reviews.text: Very knowledgeable team — handled both our electrical upgrade and a bathroom plumbing job at the same time. Saved us time and money. Will use again.

brand.usp: Adams Plumbing & Electrics offers the rare combination of fully qualified plumbing and electrical services under one roof, saving Birmingham homeowners time, hassle and money.
brand.about_paragraph: I'm Adam, and I've been keeping Birmingham homes safe, warm and running smoothly for over a decade. Whether you need an emergency plumber at short notice or a full electrical rewire, my team handles it all with professionalism and care. We're proud of our reputation for honest pricing, clean workmanship and turning up when we say we will.
